description: Recto: liturgical text in Hebrew, with a colophon in Judaeo-Arabic by the copyist Saʿadya b. Ṣedaqa concerning the owner of the scroll, Yosef b. Moshe. Verso: one word in Hebrew (ha-rav), and a single line in Arabic (‘the rent to the end of the month of Muḥarram’). (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
